'''Babbnod Luroon''', or "'''Babb'''" for short, served as first mate aboard ''[[Jynni's Virtue]]'' under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Naz Felyood]]. When the ''Virtue'' crashed near the [[Valley of Golg]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. 

After 3 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] (which in reality was 2 months), Captain Naz Felyood set out and didn't return. Presuming command of the crew, over the next 3 days (In reality 3 months), they came under attack of [[Korriban zombie]]s under the command of the return spirit, [[Dathka Graush]]. 

Luroon would create a [[Ship's log|ship log]], explaining her former allies [[Death/Legends|dying]] and becoming [[Tsaiwinokka Hoyakut|reanimated corpses]]. Knowing she would soon be overrun by the undead, Luroon had given orders to set [[Explosive charge/Legends|charges]] on the ship engines. Assuming Felyood dead and low on [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Blaster gas canister/Legends|charges]] and crew, would set off the planted explosives, blowing Jynni's Virtue engines and herself up.
